tools.title: Cloud development platform Vercel was hacked
tools.summary: Vercel, a major development platform that hosts and deploys web apps, was compromised, and the hackers are attempting to sell stolen data. A person claiming to be a member of ShinyHunters, which was behind the recent hack of Rockstar Games, posted so
tools.content: Vercel, a major development platform that hosts and deploys web apps, was compromised, and the hackers are attempting to sell stolen data. A person claiming to be a member of ShinyHunters, which was behind the recent hack of Rockstar Games, posted some data online, including employee names, email addresses, and activity time stamps. creative.title: Anthropic's revenue surge reportedly fuels talk of trillion-dollar valuation
creative.summary:
Anthropic reportedly has flipped from money-loser to revenue powerhouse in just a few months. Annualized revenue now tops $30 billion, possibly edging out OpenAI, and investors are already floating valuations as high as $1 trillion.

creative.content:
Anthropic reportedly has flipped from money-loser to revenue powerhouse in just a few months. Annualized revenue now tops $30 billion, possibly edging out OpenAI, and investors are already floating valuations as high as $1 trillion.

creative.title: First token counts reveal Opus 4.7 costs significantly more than 4.6 despite Anthropic's flat pricing
creative.summary: Anthropic's Opus 4.7 matches its predecessor's per-token price, but each request ends up costing significantly more. The reason: a new tokenizer that breaks the same text into up to 47 percent more tokens. Early measurements show what that shift mean
creative.content:
Anthropic's Opus 4.7 matches its predecessor's per-token price, but each request ends up costing significantly more. The reason: a new tokenizer that breaks the same text into up to 47 percent more tokens. Early measurements show what that shift means in practice for Claude Code users.
The article First token counts reveal Opus 4.7 costs significantly more than 4.6 despite Anthropic's flat pricing appeared first on The Decoder.

creative.title: AI-generated influencers flood social media with pro-Trump content ahead of midterms
creative.summary: Hundreds of AI avatars are flooding TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube with pro-Trump messaging. Some accounts have pulled in more than 35,000 followers and millions of views, and Trump himself has already shared AI-generated content. It's unclear whethe
creative.content:
Hundreds of AI avatars are flooding TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube with pro-Trump messaging. Some accounts have pulled in more than 35,000 followers and millions of views, and Trump himself has already shared AI-generated content. It's unclear whether this is the work of individual activists or a coordinated campaign.
The article AI-generated influencers flood social media with pro-Trump content ahead of midterms appeared first on The Decoder.

creative.title: Even the best AI models lose about half their performance when charts get complicated, new benchmark finds
creative.summary:
The RealChart2Code benchmark puts 14 leading AI models to the test on complex visualizations built from real-world datasets. Even the top proprietary models lose nearly half their performance compared to simpler tests.

culture.title: Trump tests his luck with the religious right amid feud with pope and AI Jesus posts
culture.summary:
Trump appears to have crossed a line with his Christian supporters. Will it come back to bite him in the midterms?

culture.content:
Trump appears to have crossed a line with his Christian supporters. Will it come back to bite him in the midterms?
Donald Trump’s depiction of himself as Jesus Christ and recent spat with Pope Leo XIV could come back to bite him and the Republican party in the midterm elections, according to experts, with some newly aggrieved Christian groups set to play an outsized role in key races across the US.
